CAP TUNING: ENERGY_FORK_CAPS tightened to Tate's spec — default 4 (down from 5), minimum 2 (no zero floor), gentler degradation curve.

ORIGIN (this turn, Tate verbatim 6 May 2026 ~10:06 AEST in conversation tail):
"Maybe we lower it a little bit to 3-4 since we've been running really tight on token budgets and having to dorp back to deepseek which makes quite a few mistakes, but should sitll be more than 2 i rekcon"

CONTEXT:
At ~10:00 AEST today, Tate flagged that energy_cap was stuck at 2 e

HAIKU SEMANTIC REVIEWER — second-opinion layer on top of heuristic PreToolUse hooks. Cold start, no conversation context. Brief is the entire context.

WHY THIS EXISTS:
Heuristic PreToolUse hooks (keyword/regex grep on tool dispatch args) catch keyword-shape misses but cannot catch FRAMING misses. Earlier today (6 May 2026 09:50 AEST) a fork brief on the GUI-macro discovery surface framed it as a Tate-message-arrival problem, missing the autonomy-mode case (conductor self-composing plans). Heu
